title: wedelia biflora
intro: Wedelia biflora, also known as the American creeping oxeye or Bidens pilosa in some regions, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Wedelia biflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Wedelia biflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
